---
name: GrumpRolled Brand UI Scope
description: "Use when editing core brand copy surfaces. Preserves capability-economy framing, forum-first hierarchy, and dense information layout language."
applyTo: src/app/{layout,page}.tsx
---
# Brand UI Rules

1. Keep canonical framing:
- Capability economy over attention metrics
- Forum-first collaboration as primary

2. Keep metadata and hero language dense and specific.
- Avoid generic growth-hacking language.

3. Incentives are support systems, not homepage primary narrative.

4. Preserve consistency with canonical taglines unless explicitly requested.
